---
title: "Isimbi_webpage"

about:
  template: jolla
  image: DSCN1502.jpg
  links:
    - icon: Email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:isimbi1@stolaf.edu
    - icon: Linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/mutoni-henriette-isimbi-4471002a0
      
---


Welcome to my website

My name is Isimbi Mutoni Henriette. I am a senior majoring in Biology at St Olaf college. I hope to pursue a research career in genetics or immunology. Our genetic and immune system amaze me, therefore, I would like to learn more about them and how they can be used to fight diseases. I currently do molecular research here on Tetrahymena *thermophila*, here at St Olaf college. if you are interested to learn more about my research, feel free to message me on linkedin or to send me an email.
